TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Bob_Brannum, title = Bob_Brannum, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Brannum} }

S.FORM: Bob Brannum nalecuhan i Winfield, Kansas, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. 5 bulad 28 demiad, 1925 a mihca, Bob Brannum, miunduay. (mapatay i 2005 a mihca)
S.PHON: bob brannum nar~ɾəʦuħan i winfiər~ɾd, kansas, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob brannum, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miħʦa)
S.FORM: Bob Brannum nalecuhan i Winfield, Kansas, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. 5 bulad 28 demiad, 1925 a mihca, Bob Brannum, miunduay. (mapatay i 2005 a mihca)
S.PHON: bob brannum nar~ɾəʦuħan i winfiər~ɾd, kansas, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob brannum, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miħʦa)
